message:
test(engine): add execution orchestrator and frankenctl CLI test suites

- tests/execution_orchestrator.rs (+21 lines): new integration test
  module for execution orchestrator pipeline validation
- tests/frankenctl_cli.rs (+118 lines): comprehensive CLI test harness
  for frankenctl subcommands covering argument parsing, output format
  validation, and error paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
